name: Three Cheese Deviled Eggs
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons KRAFT Three Cheese Ranch Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover eggs with cold water in a saucepan. Bring to boil.
2. Remove from heat and let stand 25 minutes.
3. To prevent dark rings on yolks, plunge immediately into very cold water and let stand until cool; peel.
4. Cut eggs in half lengthwise and remove yolks.
5. Mash yolks until smooth. Combine yolks with dressing, pepper, and mustard.
6. Spoon filling back into whites. Garnish with paprika.
